title: Immersive Aircraft Flan Compatibility
description: Adds fixes to make the experience with immersive aircaft and flan better.
body:
# Immersive Aircraft Flan Compatibility

**NOTE: THIS MOD REQUIRES IMMERSIVE AIRCRAFT AND FLAN**

Important Compatibility fixes for Immersive Aircraft and Flan
**
This mod aims to fix compatibility issues (especially the critical ones) between Immersive Aircraft and the Flan land claiming mod.**

**Current fixes**

Prevents the player from not being able to access their aircraft after unmounting it in a flan claim.

 

**How it works**

When the pilot (player) mounts an aircraft as the controlling passenger, the aircraft saves the pilot's UUID in its data. Allowing them to mount their aircraft even if they unmount it inside flan claims.

If you are aware of other incompatibilities with Immersive Aircraft and Flan please report them on the issue tracker.
